items.headline_en: n8n release feed now shows v1: :rocket: Release 1.123.38 (#29514)
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for n8n changed and the newest visible tag is v1: :rocket: Release 1.123.38 (#29514). The feed timestamp is 2026-04-29T13:55:01Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
items.evidence_excerpt: title=v1: :rocket: Release 1.123.38 (#29514) updated=2026-04-29T13:55:01Z link=https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/v1 summary= content=Co-authored-by: mfsiega 93014743+mfsiega@users.noreply.github.com title=n8n@1.123.38 updated=2026-04-29T14:20:33Z link=https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n%401.123.38 summary= content=1.123.38 (2026-04-29) Bug Fixes core: Fix code node executions hanging when idle timer overlaps with task acceptance ( #29393 ) ( 4af49f1 ) core: Fix task runner hanging when connection attempt fails ( #29441 ) ( 271af23 ) Features core: Add --include and --exclude flags to import:credentials command ( #29465 ) ( 6aaf436 ) core: Add --projectId filter to export:workflow and export:credentials commands ( #29373 ) ( 55cad3b )
diff_excerpt: +content=1.123.38 (2026-04-29) Bug Fixes core: Fix code node executions hanging when idle timer overlaps with task acceptance ( #29393 ) ( 4af49f1 ) core: Fix task runner hanging when connection attempt fails ( #29441 ) ( 271af23 ) Features core: Add --include and --exclude flags to import:credentials command ( #29465 ) ( 6aaf436 ) core: Add --projectId filter to export:workflow and export:credentials commands ( #29373 ) ( 55cad3b )

content=2.17.8 (2026-04-27) Bug Fixes Disable "Get 100 free OpenAI API credits" if aiGateway enabled in the license ( #29058 ) ( 11c5ad9 ) editor: Refresh wallet balance when usage refresh is clicked ( #29081 ) ( 5e95d38 )
